description: T. M. Lankage Vs Director General of Pensions and Others before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: T. M. Lankage Vs Director General of Pensions and Others
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The Petitioner was a member of the Institute of Advanced Technological Education and was absorbed into the same when he was serving as a Class II officer of the Department of Technological Education and Training. The Petitioner retired in 2011; sought pension in terms of Section 2 of the Pension Minutes of 1997. Refused by the authorities since he had not completed 120 months (10 years) in the initial service; Petitioner challenged the same. Held - Application refused.
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
